description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in weathered, multi-toned shingles. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, and the structure features a prominent covered porch supported by sturdy wooden posts. The cabin has a single chimney rising from the roof ridge, suggesting a fireplace or wood stove inside. Windows are arranged in symmetrical groupings, with a set of three rectangular windows on one side and two smaller square windows above. The overall appearance is that of a traditional countryside or mountain cabin, blending natural materials and simple, functional design. The muted earth tones and visible wood grain give it a cozy, lived-in feel suitable for rural or suburban settings.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, covered porch, and symmetrical window arrangements, finished in weathered earth tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the covered porch, two small square windows above, and a set of three rectangular windows below.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the steep, shingled gable roof and the chimney near the ridge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the same window arrangement as view 0, but porch is less visible.
description_view_3: Front view showing the full width of the covered porch and the main entrance area beneath the roof overhang.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with overhangs and weathered shingle covering, featuring a single chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Three rectangular windows grouped horizontally on the main wall, with two smaller square windows above; symmetrical and evenly spaced
attribute_door_placement: Single main door located on the front facade beneath the porch, centered relative to the porch structure
